text: Orrentek Precision Mfg (SUP-001), Tier-1, China (APAC), has an active disruption 'No disruption' as of Q3-2024. Under Section 9 this warrants a Level 1 - Monitor response, driven by its Low risk level. Required actions: weekly status update, safety stock adjusted by +15%, alternate supplier not required.

Section 9 defines three disruption response levels. Level 1 (Monitor): Low-risk suppliers with a disruption flag - weekly status updates, safety stock +15%. Level 2 (Manage): Medium-risk - bi-weekly escalation calls, safety stock +30%, alternate supplier on 48-hour readiness notice. Level 3 (Activate): High-risk or any mandatory category - immediate CPO escalation, alternate activated for at least 40% of volume within 10 business days, safety stock +50%, full RCA within 15 business days. Mandatory Level 3 categories regardless of risk: export control restrictions, active labour strikes, regulatory enforcement actions, and port closures exceeding 72 hours.
